scripts.release: bun tauri build --bundles app && ditto -c -k --sequesterRsrc --keepParent src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/curate-draw.app /Users/jan-hendrik/projects/jan-hendrik-mueller.de/public/curate-draw.zip && python3 -c "import json; p=json.load(open('package.json')); json.dump({'version':p['version']},open('/Users/jan-hendrik/projects/jan-hendrik-mueller.de/public/curate-draw-version.json','w'))"
